dramas.title: The Wolfless Carpenter Rules the World
dramas.tagline: Cast out by the very father he longed to embrace, Raven—the exiled heir of the Redclaw—returns home only to face ultimate rejection. But when the monstrous Bloodshadow Tribe descends upon his kin, he unleashes a dormant power, rising from an outcast to the savior who turns the tide of war.

dramas.title: Lady CEO's Fatal Contract
dramas.tagline: Terrified yet determined to make him pay, Violet continues as Liam's submissive despite her nerves, wondering if her predecessor, Eve, felt the same. But as Liam watches her, he is haunted by flashbacks of his ex—triggered by the open-heart surgery scar he notices on Violet's body. As the lines between past and present blur, a dangerous question looms: will Liam uncover Violet's lies?

dramas.title: The Discarded Ace
dramas.tagline: Born into the prestigious Wilson family, Leo was abandoned from birth due to ruthless internal power struggles. For eighteen years, he was treated as a discarded pawn, forced to survive alone at the bottom of society while his family refused to acknowledge his existence. However, his fate changed when he was taken in by a reclusive gambling legend. After years of secret training, Leo has now emerged as a master of high-stakes gambling, ready to make his move.

dramas.title: From Butcher to No.1
dramas.tagline: After leaving the forest to search for his birth parents, Arthur rescues a noblewoman named Vivian, who is being hunted by orcs. He soon arrives at the Northern Fortress, where he gradually uncovers a stunning truth: the eagle-crested pendant he wears is linked to the ducal family, and the Duchess has already recognized him as her long-lost son. However, trapped in a web of power struggles, the Duke remains too afraid to publicly acknowledge Arthur's true identity.

dramas.title: Married The Mafioso I Saved
dramas.tagline: After filing her resignation, Hannah boards a train and rents a car, thrilled by the thought of reuniting with her boyfriend, Cody, in the United States. But her excitement turns to horror when she hears a strange noise from Cody's room. Now, trapped in a car with a bloodied mob boss, she faces a terrifying question: will he watch her shock in silence, or strike?

dramas.title: My Classmate Is My Grandson
dramas.tagline: A brilliant scientist who died saving her son, Vivian Carter wakes up 70 years later in the body of an 18-year-old. She returns to the Sterling empire to find her once little boy now an old man, and her great-grandsons in crisis. While Alex is blind to his girlfriend's betrayal, the charming Liam treats life like a game. Vivian must expose the lies, heal her fractured family, and in the process, rediscover the joy of living.

dramas.title: Reborn As A Secret
dramas.tagline: Sent back to the second year of the apocalypse, he unlocks a system that fuels his evolution by devouring monsters. Yet, the serpent crest branded on his arm shackles him to the sinister secrets of the Blood Moon. As he slowly morphs into the very nightmare humanity dreads, a terrifying question remains: will he bend this darkness to save the world, or be swallowed by the abyss?

dramas.title: Mafia Heiress's Forbidden
dramas.tagline: After the Mafia boss is assassinated, his 20-year-old daughter, Gloria, is thrust into power, forced to take over the family empire. She soon falls for her handsome 34-year-old ex-FBI bodyguard, Theo. But their romance takes a twisted turn when Gloria mistakes a locket photo of her late mother for herself. Now, trapped in a tangled web of love and suspicion, she begins to wonder: is the man she's falling for actually the one who murdered her father?

dramas.title: Cyberking Reclaims His Throne
dramas.tagline: After legendary hacker Max Lennon exposed the Pentagon's darkest secrets, he was brutally betrayed by his girlfriend, who pushed him off a rooftop to silence him. Miraculously, Max survived the fall, but when Suki Ruskin rescued him two months later, he was left with complete amnesia. Now, the fate of his past lies in Suki's hands—can she help Max unlock his memories and reclaim his throne?

dramas.title: 財閥令嬢様の二重生活
dramas.tagline: 妻・彩を金目当ての女だと疑い続けてきたCEO・藤堂賢。結婚3年目、彩は彼のもとを去り、実家である大富豪の令嬢として新たな人生をスタートさせる。自分の過ちに気づいた賢の後悔は募るばかりだ。復讐か、それともよりを戻すか。彩の選択はいかに。

dramas.title: Genius Baby Gets Daddy Back
dramas.tagline: A bizarre medical mix-up leaves the innocent Violet Gray pregnant by billionaire Carter Watts. To secure a future for their unborn child, they rush into a hasty marriage. However, Carter departs for overseas shortly after, disappearing without a trace for six long years. During this time, Violet raises their son, Patrick, on her own while working tirelessly at a five-star hotel. Fate plays a cruel joke when the hotel is suddenly acquired by a mysterious tycoon—who turns out to be Carter! After six years apart, they are complete strangers and fail to recognize each other. It isn't until a twist of fate that Violet makes the shocking discovery: her charming new boss is actually her long-lost husband...

dramas.title: She Came Our Lucky
dramas.tagline: Blessed with golden eyes and mystical powers, Mia is a living good luck charm to her adoptive family—until they cruelly take all the credit and try to sell her off. After a narrow escape, she finds refuge with Carrick, an ill-fated tycoon who is secretly her real father. Unaware of their blood ties, Mia turns his fortune around. When she spots a hidden gold mine at an auction, she hands Carrick the ultimate weapon to crush her treacherous former family once and for all.

dramas.title: Fatal Attraction: The Hybrid Princess
dramas.tagline: Natalie is a rare hybrid—a powerful blend of werewolf, dragon, and vampire. In Fatal Temptation: The Hybrid Princess, this unique lineage makes her a prime target for those hunting her for various dark motives. After fleeing her pack due to a heartbreaking betrayal, she is forced to return upon hearing the news of her parents' death and the rise of a mysterious new Alpha.

dramas.title: Sweet Submission of My Bullies
dramas.tagline: Torn between a toxic obsession and a healing embrace, Riley finds her life spiraling at an elite high school she only joined to save her mother. As a talented volleyball player, she expected pressure on the court, not a dangerous romance with Drake, the very boy tormenting her. While his cruelty pushes her to the brink, the gentle Julian offers a safe haven, forcing Riley to confront a devastating question: will she gamble her heart on the bad boy who breaks her, or find salvation in the one who truly sees her?

dramas.title: Fake Dating My Rich Nemesis
dramas.tagline: A single night of reckless passion was the last thing on her mind when she stepped back into North Lake High, let alone with the Beaumont heir—her childhood nemesis. Now, this sassy returnee finds herself entangled in a messy, high-stakes game: teaming up with the very boy she used to despise to make their exes jealous. But as their fake romance sparks real heat, she has to wonder: is this alliance just a calculated move for revenge, or is it the unexpected beginning of falling for her worst enemy?

dramas.title: Watch Out! She's a Mastermind Heiress
dramas.tagline: In The Prodigy's Return, 20-year-old Evelyn Vance is brought back to her aristocratic family after growing up off the grid. She instantly becomes the target of the charming yet predatory CEO, Lucas Grayson, who relentlessly woos her for her potential inheritance, blind to the fact that she is the legendary 'Ghost Doctor' he has been desperate to hire. At the same time, her envious cousin, Sophie, who was raised in Evelyn's place, is on a mission to humiliate her at every family gala. Unfortunately for Sophie, Evelyn possesses unparalleled medical skills and a razor-sharp intellect. She repeatedly saves the family empire from crises, outmaneuvering Sophie’s petty traps with ease. As her true identity is revealed, Evelyn wins the adoration of her parents and five doting brothers, becoming the family's most prized jewel while remaining perpetually one step ahead of Lucas's grasp.

dramas.title: The Magnificent Bodyguard
dramas.tagline: Kael is the deadliest mercenary to ever walk off a black-ops grid, a man with no past and lethal instincts. Desperate to uncover the truth behind his brother's mysterious death, he accepts a high-stakes contract: protect Dr. Elena Rostova, the brilliant virologist who developed a vaccine for a deadly engineered plague. Hunted by a shadowy syndicate that wants to weaponize her cure for mass profit, Elena will do anything to keep the formula and her young assistant safe. The only one standing between her and certain death? Kael, who intercepts every assassination attempt with brutal efficiency. But who IS he? Why does he move like a ghost? And can Elena trust the man whose cold exterior cracked during their explosive, anonymous encounter just hours before the mission began?

dramas.title: The Adjuster
dramas.tagline: In The Formula, after his daughter is denied a life-saving experimental drug due to a bureaucratic loophole, Elias Thorne, a former pharmaceutical researcher, takes justice into his own hands by assassinating the head of the country's largest drug cartel. But he isn't just out for revenge; he has a bigger goal: to expose how big pharma buries cheap cures to maximize profits. Elias stays one step ahead of the federal agents, hacking into public screens to leak classified documents alongside his targets. He soon becomes a symbol of resistance to the patients the corrupt executives thought they could exploit.

dramas.title: Love Me, My Mafia Killer
dramas.tagline: The massacre of her family leaves Valery Hartman as the only living witness, placing her directly in the crosshairs of the mafia. Her life hangs by a thread until Damian Vitale, a ruthless enforcer, intervenes. Instead of silencing her, he claims her, dragging her into his brutal empire of crime and loyalty. But the nightmare deepens when Valery uncovers a dark secret: her parents were far from innocent, and the man she is beginning to desire is the very assassin who executed them. Caught in a web of vengeance and twisted attraction, Valery decides to weaponize her vulnerability. She will manipulate Damian into falling for her, ensuring his devotion is the prelude to his destruction.

dramas.title: Djinn Under Contract
dramas.tagline: Bound within a magic lamp for thousands of years, the genie Eli Baran is finally offered a path to freedom by a billionaire—but at a steep price. To fulfill his master's final wish, Eli must transform into a human and enter a five-year marriage with the billionaire's granddaughter, Christine Parrish. During their union, Eli secretly uses his powers to pave the way for Christine's success as a CEO, yet his devotion is met with nothing but cold indifference and constant belittlement. As the five-year contract nears its end, Eli is forced to confront a painful reality: Christine may never love him, especially now that her old flame has reentered the picture. With his heart shattered and his wish nearly fulfilled, Eli faces an impossible choice: remain bound to a woman who despises him, or finally walk away to claim the freedom and life he has waited millennia for.
